title: Senior Software Engineer - Recruitment Management System

criteria.name: Backend engineering depth
criteria.description: Production experience building and maintaining backend services (APIs, databases, background jobs)

criteria.name: Performance & scale
criteria.description: Evidence of diagnosing and fixing performance problems in high-volume systems (query optimisation, async processing, caching)

criteria.name: AI-native working
criteria.description: Practical use of AI/LLM tools in the development workflow or in shipped product features

criteria.name: Ownership & communication
criteria.description: Owns outcomes end to end; communicates clearly with stakeholders; remote-friendly async habits

criteria.name: Hiring-domain familiarity
criteria.description: Exposure to recruitment, HR tech, or other workflow-heavy B2B SaaS domains
